# Discussion Categories

We use GitHub Discussions to organize community conversations:

## 💡 Ideas
Suggest new features, categories, or improvements to the project.

## 🙏 Q&A
Ask questions about APIs, how to use the list, or get help finding the right API.

## 🗣️ General
Chat about anything related to free APIs and developer resources.

## 🏆 Show & Tell
Share projects you've built using APIs from this list!
